candidate_report: The candidate shows strong proficiency in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) and core web technologies including JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Experience with Git is explicitly mentioned, aligning with JD requirements.

The candidate has built diverse projects including a state-managed Notes App, a backend-focused URL Shortener API, and a complex UI clone (Pinterest), demonstrating both frontend and backend capabilities.

Holds a Bachelor of Computer Applications. While primary experience stems from intensive training and self-led projects, the candidate demonstrates practical application of theory in full-stack environments.
High. Matches all core requirements: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, and REST API development.
